---
title: "Lecture 7: Self-supervision and generative AI"
subtitle: >
  {{< var course.code >}}, {{< var course.term >}}
number-sections: false
---

## Lecture overview
### Learning outcomes
- TODO

### Pre-class work
::: {.content-hidden when-profile="student" when-profile="ta"}
#### Instructors
1. TODO

#### Coordinators
1. TODO
:::

::: {.content-hidden when-profile="student"}
#### TAs
1. TODO
:::

#### Learners
1. TODO

### Lecture timeline
::: {.list-table}
- - Topic
  - Time
  - Materials

- - Admin
  - 5 min

- - [Differences from previous lectures](#sec-prev-lectures)
  - 5 min

- - [Next token prediction](#sec-next-token)
  - 20 min

- - [Diffusion models](#sec-diffusion)
  - 20 min

- - [Activity: Images and text](#sec-image-text)
  - 20 min

- - [Wrap-up](#sec-wrap-up)
  - 10 min

- - Admin
  - 5 min
:::

### Post-class work
::: {.content-hidden when-profile="student" when-profile="ta"}
#### Instructors
1. TODO

#### Coordinators
1. TODO
:::

::: {.content-hidden when-profile="student"}
#### TAs
1. TODO
:::

#### Learners
1. TODO

## Differences from previous lectures{#sec-prev-lectures}
- TODO we've been "helping" the model up until now - this is called supervision
- TODO deep learning still need some sort of supervision re: labels
- TODO rl: still somewhat helping the model 
- TODO labelling the data becomes too difficult/costly as the dataset becomes large. no option other than self-supervision
- TODO what is self-supervision? data is puzzle, model learns how to predict next word. define it here
- TODO define generative AI

## Next-token prediction{#sec-next-token}
- TODO define token?
- TODO ngrams? masking?

:::{.callout-tip}
### Activity: Hands-on next-token prediction
TODO show a small corpus, figure out the next token bigram probabilities, then have them predict the next token for a few words
- this or maybe having them just pick the next word based on common sense? how technical/probability focused do we want to get?
:::

## Diffusion models{#sec-diffusion}
- TODO add increasingly more noise to image, ask model to remove it, this is the training process
- TODO figure of adding noise to an image, then removing it, maybe interactive?

:::{.callout-tip}
### Activity: Diffusion
TODO decide on which activity to do
:::

## Activity: Images and text{#sec-image-text}
TODO: decide on activity
- embeddings with semantic similarity. text-to-image association?

## Wrap-up{#sec-wrap-up}

:::{.callout-tip}
### Activity: Discussion
- TODO
:::
